## Checklist

- [ ] All skills have YAML frontmatter with `name` and `description`
- [ ] All skills have `metadata:` block with research-domain, task-type, research-phase, verification-level
- [ ] Plugin has `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- [ ] Plugin has `SKILL.md`
- [ ] Repository is public
